section.div: A monolithic kernel in pure Rust, inspired by the Linux kernel
A PDF parsing library written in pure Rust.
A modern interactive shell written in Rust, driven by a state machine, and natively integrated with AI intelligent assistance.
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io
